channel.title: Chemical Product and Process Modeling
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Chemical Product and Process Modeling

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Paniz Salimi Babamiri, Bahman Zarenezhad, Maryam Khajenoori DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-frontmatter5

item.title: Energy cost prediction for chromium removal by nanofiltration membrane
item.description: Article by Paniz Salimi Babamiri, Bahman Zarenezhad, Maryam Khajenoori DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0012

item.title: Forecasting gasification sustainability through enhanced K-nearest neighbour models for hydrogen and nitrogen amount
item.description: Article by Paniz Salimi Babamiri, Bahman Zarenezhad, Maryam Khajenoori DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0013

item.title: Applying machine learning for biomass gasification prediction: enhancing efficiency and sustainability
item.description: Article by Paniz Salimi Babamiri, Bahman Zarenezhad, Maryam Khajenoori DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0014

item.title: Enhancing prediction of elemental composition through machine learning decision tree models for biomass gasification optimization
item.description: Article by Paniz Salimi Babamiri, Bahman Zarenezhad, Maryam Khajenoori DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0011

item.title: Nonlinear model predictive controller of hydrogenation of dimethyl oxalate for ethylene glycol production
item.description: Article by Paniz Salimi Babamiri, Bahman Zarenezhad, Maryam Khajenoori DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0025

item.title: Dynamic optimization of boiler for minimizing energy consumption in the intentionally transient process operation: effect of different interval number
item.description: Article by Paniz Salimi Babamiri, Bahman Zarenezhad, Maryam Khajenoori DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0018

item.title: Heat transfer efficiency in gas–solid fluidized beds with flat and corrugated walls
item.description: Article by Paniz Salimi Babamiri, Bahman Zarenezhad, Maryam Khajenoori DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0038

item.title: Ant lion based optimization for performance improvement of methanol production
item.description: Article by Paniz Salimi Babamiri, Bahman Zarenezhad, Maryam Khajenoori DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0030

item.title: Boundary Element Method for Viscous Flow through Out-phase Slip-patterned Microchannel under the Influence of Inclined Magnetic Field
item.description: Article by Paniz Salimi Babamiri, Bahman Zarenezhad, Maryam Khajenoori DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0065

item.title: Artificial neural network models for forecasting the extracted yield of essential oils from Curcuma longa L. by hydro-distillation
item.description: Article by Paniz Salimi Babamiri, Bahman Zarenezhad, Maryam Khajenoori DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/cppm-2024-0020
